AdaptivePageDescription: Notes: Wait for profiles to load before starting mode!
EnablePresetForAutomaticSwitching: Enable this preset for automatic switching. Can be used to exclude games/apps from auto switch.
BasicAdaptiveModeSettingsDescription: Provides the ability to toggle/set adaptive mode targets.
MaxTemperatureLimitToolTip: Controls the max temperature limit adaptive mode is allowed to set
MaxPowerLimitToolTip: Controls the max power limit adpative mode is allowed to set
MaxCurveOptimiserLimitToolTip: Controls the max negative curve optimiser limit adpative mode is allowed to set
AmdApuIGpuTboDescription: Provides the ability to toggle/set Turbo Boost Overdrive iGPU targets.
AmdApuMaxIGpuClockLimitDescription: Controls the maximum iGPU clock speed adaptive mode is allowed to set
AmdApuMinIGpuClockLimitDescription: Controls the minimum iGPU clock speed adaptive mode is allowed to set
AmdApuMinCpuClockLimitDescription: Controls the minimum CPU clock speed at which adaptive mode will start throttling iGPU clocks
AmdApuIGpuTboNote: Notes: Ensure you balance CPU and iGPU clocks out for the best performance!
SuperResolutionDescription: Powered by a customised version of Magpie. Use Alt+F to toggle.
EnableVSyncTooltip: Synchronises capture frame rate to display refresh rate.
AutoRecaptureTooltip: Auto recaptures the previous capture window after focus was lost and restored.
CaptureSharpnessTooltip: Controls UXTU Super Resolution capture image sharpness.
ResolutionScaleTooltip: Controls the resolution of the window being captured. Use application controlled if you do not want UXTU to override the window resolution. Not all applications will be compatible with this mode!
RadeonGraphicsOptionsDescrption: Provides the ability to customise driver graphics options
RadeonAntiLagTooltip: Enables AMD Radeon™ Anti-Lag within drivers on supported hardware.
RadeonSuperResolutionTooltip: Enables AMD Radeon™ Super Resolution within drivers on supported hardware. Also allows you to set a custom sharpness effect.
RadeonBoostTooltip: Enables AMD Radeon™ Boost within drivers on supported hardware. Also allows you to set a minimum resolution in %.
RadeonImageSharpeningTooltip: Enables AMD Radeon™ Image Sharpening within drivers on supported hardware. Allows you to set a custom sharpness effect.
EnhancedSyncTooltip: Enables AMD Enhanced Sync within drivers on supported hardware.
NVIDIAGPUTuningTooltip: Provides the ability to set tune your NVIDIA GPU.
FrequencyAdjustedVoltageLimitTooltip: Controls the maximum voltage your GPU will run within the Frequency/Voltage curve based on clock speed. You can undervolt your NVIDIA GPU by lowering this clock speed below stock and increasing the core clock offset. Start at your GPU's rated boost clock and work down. To reset it, set it to the maximum possible clock the slider allows.
GPUCoreClockOffsetTooltip: Controls the clock offset for your NVIDIA GPU's core clock
GPUMemoryClockTooltip: Controls the clock offset for your NVIDIA GPU's VRAM clock
NVIDIAGPUTuningNote: Warning: We are not liable for any damages to hardware or resulting instabilities caused by adjustment of frequencies and voltages.
ASUSPowerProfileDescription: Provides the ability to set an ASUS power profile. This will override Armoury Crate!
StaticRTSSFrameRateDescription: Provides the ability to set a custom RTSS frame limit.
RTSSFrameLimitTooltip: Controls the set FPS limit in RTSS
BatteryChargePresetDescription: Provides the ability to set a preset to apply when the battery is charging.
ReloadPresetsTooltip: Updates dropdown list with current presets
BatteryDischargePresetDescription: Provides the ability to set a preset to apply when the battery is discharging.
SystemResumePresetDescription: Provides the ability to set a preset to apply on system resume from sleep/hibernation.
CreatedBy: Created by JamesCJ, sbski and ProjectSBC
UxtuCommandOutputDescription: Note: Some output commands may not be compatible with RyzenAdj
StressTestWarning: WARNING: This will put extreme stress on your CPU. Use at your own risk!
Name: Name
Caption: Caption
ReloadSettingsOfCurrentPresetValues: Reload settings of current preset values
SaveCurrentSettingsAsNewPreset: Save current settings as new preset
APUTemperatureTuningDesc: Provides the ability to set APU thermal targets.
ControlsTempLimitAPUSoftThrottling: Controls the temperature limit at which the APU starts soft throttling
ControlsChassisTempLimitAPUThrottling: Controls the laptop chassis temperature limit at which the APU starts throttling
CPUTemperatureTuningDesc: Provides the ability to set CPU thermal targets.
ControlsTempLimitCPUHardThrottling: Controls the temperature limit at which the CPU starts hard throttling
APUPowerTuningDesc: Provides the ability to set APU power targets.
ControlsAPUSTAPMPowerLimit: Controls the APU's Skin Temperature Aware Power Management power limit
ControlsAPUSlowBoostDuration:
Controls the APU's slow boost duration power limit.
Within SmartShift enabled systems, this options controls the total power shared between the AMD CPU and AMD dGPU
ControlsAPUSlowBoostPowerLimit: Controls how long the APU stays within the slow boost power limit
ControlsAPUFastBoostDuration:
Controls the APU's fast boost duration power limit.
Within SmartShift enabled systems, this options controls the total power shared between the AMD CPU and AMD dGPU
ControlsAPUFastBoostPowerLimit: Controls how long the APU stays within the fast boost power limit
CPUPowerTuningDesc: Provides the ability to set CPU power targets.
ControlsCPUPPTLimit: Controls the CPU's Package Power Tracking power limit
ControlsCPUEDCLimit: Controls the CPU's Electrical Design Current limit
ControlsCPUTDCLimit: Controls the CPU's Thermal Design Current limit
ControlsCPUTotalPowerLimit: Controls the CPU's total power limit
ControlsCPUShortBoostPowerLimit: Controls the CPU's short boost power limit
APUVRMTuningDesc: Provides the ability to set APU VRM current targets.
ControlsSoCTDCLimit: Controls the SoC's Thermal Design Current limit
ControlsSoCEDCLimit: Controls the SoC's Electrical Design Current limit
ControlsiGPUTDCLimit: Controls the iGPU's Thermal Design Current limit
ControlsiGPUEDCLimit: Controls the iGPU's Electrical Design Current limit
iGPUTuningDesc: Provides the ability to set a static iGPU boost clock on select APUs/CPUs.
ControlsiGPUStaticBoostClock: Controls the static boost clock speed of the iGPU, requires either a system reboot or system sleep to revert back to normal.
APUSoftClockLimitTuningDesc: Provides the ability to set various soft clock speed targets on select APUs.
ControlsMinimumSoftClockiGPU:
Controls the minimum soft clock target of the iGPU.
This only works when within your APUs specification.
ControlsMaximumSoftClockiGPU:
Controls the maximum soft clock target of the iGPU.
This only works when within your APUs specification.
ControlsMinimumSoftClockCPU:
Controls the minimum soft clock target of the CPU.
This only works when within your APUs specification.
ControlsMaximumSoftClockCPU:
Controls the maximum soft clock target of the CPU.
This only works when within your APUs specification.
ControlsMinimumSoftClockDataLaunch: Controls the minimum soft clock target of the Data Launch Clock. This only works when within your APUs specification.
ControlsMaximumSoftClockDataLaunch: Controls the maximum soft clock target of the Data Launch Clock. This only works when within your APUs specification.
ControlsMinimumSoftClockInfinityFabric: Controls the minimum soft clock target of the Infinity Fabric. This only works when within your APUs specification.
ControlsMaximumSoftClockInfinityFabric: Controls the maximum soft clock target of the Infinity Fabric. This only works when within your APUs specification.
ControlsMinimumSoftClockSoC: Controls the minimum soft clock target of the SoC. This only works when within your APUs specification.
ControlsMaximumSoftClockSoC: Controls the maximum soft clock target of the SoC. This only works when within your APUs specification.
ControlsMinimumSoftClockVCN: Controls the minimum soft clock target of the Video Core Next. This only works when within your APUs specification.
ControlsMaximumSoftClockVCN:
Controls the maximum soft clock target of the Video Core Next.
This only works when within your APUs specification.
UXTUSuperResolutionDesc:
Powered by a customised version of Magpie.
Use Alt+F to toggle.
SynchronisesCaptureFrameRate: Synchronises capture frame rate to display refresh rate.
AutoRecapturesPreviousCapture: Auto recaptures the previous capture window after focus was lost and restored.
ControlsUXTUSuperResolutionSharpness: Controls UXTU Super Resolution capture image sharpness.
ControlsResolutionOfWindow:
Controls the resolution of the window being captured.
Use application controlled if you do not want UXTU to override the window resolution.
Not all applications will be compatible with this mode!
RadeonGraphicsOptionsDesc: Provides the ability to customise driver graphics options
EnablesAMDRadeonAntiLag: Enables AMD Radeon™ Anti-Lag within drivers on supported hardware.
EnablesAMDRadeonSuperResolution:
Enables AMD Radeon™ Super Resolution within drivers on supported hardware.
Also allows you to set a custom sharpness effect.
EnablesAMDRadeonBoost:
Enables AMD Radeon™ Boost within drivers on supported hardware.
Also allows you to set a minimum resolution in %.
EnablesAMDRadeonImageSharpening: Enables AMD Radeon™ Image Sharpening within drivers on supported hardware. Allows you to set a custom sharpness effect.
EnablesAMDEnhancedSync: Enables AMD Enhanced Sync within drivers on supported hardware.
NVIDIAGPUTuningDesc: Provides the ability to tune your NVIDIA GPU.
ControlsMaximumVoltageGPU:
Controls the maximum voltage your GPU will run within the Frequency/Voltage curve based on clock speed.
You can undervolt your NVIDIA GPU by lowering this clock speed below stock and increasing the core clock offset.
Start at your GPU's rated boost clock and work down.
To reset it, set it to the maximum possible clock the slider allows.
ControlsClockOffsetNVIDIAGPUCore: Controls the clock offset for your NVIDIA GPU's core clock
ControlsClockOffsetNVIDIAGPUVRAM: Controls the clock offset for your NVIDIA GPU's VRAM clock
WarningHardwareDamages: Warning: We are not liable for any damages to hardware or resulting instabilities caused by adjustment of frequencies and voltages.
IntelPowerBalanceDesc: Provides the ability to tune the power balance of your Intel CPU.
IntelClockRatioControlDesc: Provides the ability to tune the clock ratios of your Intel CPU based the number of cores actively in use.
IntelFIVRTuningDesc: Provides the ability to tune the voltages of your Intel CPU.
AMDRyzenCPUTuningDesc: Provides the ability to set tune your AMD Ryzen™ CPU.
ProvidesAbilityStaticCPUClock: Provides the ability to set a static CPU clock
ControlsSetVoltageCPU: Controls the set voltage for the CPU
AMDPrecisionBoostOverdriveDesc: Provides the ability to customise PBO options.
AllowsControlPBOScalar: Allows control to change the PBO Scalar which adjusts the FIT/FITness/FailuresInTime limit by the set amount
AMDCurveOptimiserDesc: Provides the ability to customise Curve Optimiser options.
AllowsControlAllCoreCurveOptimiser: Allows control to change the all core Curve Optimiser Frequency/Voltage curve offset
AllowsControliGPUCurveOptimiser: Allows control to change the iGPU Curve Optimiser Frequency/Voltage curve offset
AMDPerCoreCurveOptimiserDesc: Provides the ability to customise per-core Curve Optimiser options.
CCDAffinityModeDesc: Directs threads to selected CCDs, trimming cross-die traffic and fine-tuning performance.
AMDBoostProfileDesc: Provides the ability to set a manual boost profile which impact on boost delay.
DisplayRefreshRateDesc:
Provides the ability to set a custom supported display refresh rate.
May not work for everyone!
PowerModeDesc: Provides the ability to change the Windows power mode from a preset.
ASUSPowerProfileDesc:
Provides the ability to set an ASUS power profile.
This will override Armoury Crate!
ASUSGPUUltimateModeDesc:
Provides the ability to manually toggle MUX switch on/off.
This will override Armoury Crate!
ASUSiGPUOnlyModeDesc:
Provides the ability to toggle iGPU only mode on/off.
This will override Armoury Crate!
